businessQuestion: Which stores achieved the highest OTIF (On-Time In-Full) performance?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    AVG(FSO.ON_TIME_IN_FULL_PCT) AS OTIF_PERCENTAGE,
    AVG(FSO.ORDER_FILL_RATE_PCT) AS AVG_FILL_RATE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STORE_OTIF FSO
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
ON FSO.STORE_KEY=DS.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY DS.STORE_NAME
ORDER BY OTIF_PERCENTAGE DESC;
businessContext: Retail operations leaders want to benchmark fulfillment performance across stores.
